face.structure: angular jawline with pronounced cheekbones, giving a lean and sharp appearance

eyes.shape: sharp almond with slightly uptilted outer corners
details: thin rim of dark navy around the iris
light gray radiating spokes from the pupil
distinct white highlights near the upper lash line
eyes.expression_effect: gives an intense, probing look suggestive of calculation and analysis

face.expression: subtly raised eyebrow with a barely noticeable smirk, conveying sardonic humor

skin.texture: smooth with a slight natural sheen, hinting at youthfulness
skin.rendering_notes: use soft gradient transitions to emphasize cheekbone and nose bridge highlights

hair.style: short on sides, longer on top with a tousled and slightly spiky finish
hair.flow: top hair naturally falls forward, creating a slightly unruly effect
details: few strands falling over the forehead
subtle lighter brown highlights catching the light

character.aura: perceptive and intense, with an undercurrent of unspoken deliberation

outfit.design: dark charcoal with understated silver stitching
details: zippered front with a simple pull-tab
outfit.fit: slim fit, closely tailoring to body without restricting movement

composition.framing: three-quarter body shot, slightly left of center
composition.pose: leaning slightly back with arms folded across chest
composition.gesture: right index finger tapping against left bicep, emphasizing contemplation

background.color_palette: cool grays and blues with hints of metallic silver
background.details: vague suggestions of skyscrapers and distant city lights
background.rules: maintain a balance between detailed character and muted background elements to avoid distraction
